documentation.file_docstring: Check if the formatted_body contains a matrix.to mention link for the given user ID. Many Matrix clients (including Element) use HTML links in formatted_body instead of or in addition to the m.mentions field.

inline_comments: Escape special regex characters in the user ID (e.g., @user:matrix.org)

Check formatted_body for matrix.to mention links (legacy/alternative mention format)
